case_title: MORIS A BONILLA VS. JOSE BUNAVENTURA VINALS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONILLA, MORIS A AS TO DEFENDANT VINALS, JOSE BUNAVENTURA , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRO LINE PAINTING CO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT VINALS, JOSE BUNAVENTURA , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRO LINE PAINTING CO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONILLA, MORIS A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINALS, JOSE BUNAVENTURA , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRO LINE PAINTING CO $2,926.00 PRINCIPAL, $69.74 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,175.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
